context7.description: Provides latest documentation for React, Vite, Tailwind, Supabase, Auth0, Radix UI, and more

github.description: Read/create PRs, issues, commits, branches. Set GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in .env.local

playwright.description: Browser automation for E2E testing, screenshots, UI debugging

serena.description: Advanced code navigation, symbol search, refactoring support. Requires: pip install uv

docker.description: Manage Docker containers, images, networks, volumes. View logs, inspect containers, start/stop services

brave-search.description: Web search for coding questions. Get BRAVE_API_KEY from https://brave.com/search/api/ (optional, has free tier)

filesystem.description: Enhanced file system access for the project directory
